hypothesis: Introducing charged residues at position 6 and hydrophobic residues at positions 5 and 11 will enhance binding affinity by optimizing electrostatic interactions and hydrophobic packing in the SSTR2 binding pocket.

critic_feedback_used.hypothesis: Structural quality is prioritized over ddG magnitude in current scoring, requiring balance between binding affinity and model reliability.

proposed_changes.rationale: Current threshold rejects candidates with physiologically relevant ddG values. Lowering the threshold allows more negative ddG (better binding) to pass.
Strict clash thresholds are rejecting valid candidates with minor steric clashes. Increasing allows more flexible sampling.
